name: imaging
description: A pure-Kirito image-processing library in the spirit of Pillow, built on the tensor standard library. Image class with PNG/PPM/BMP/JPEG/GIF codecs, conversions, geometry, point ops, ImageOps, convolution ImageFilter, ImageDraw, and an OpenCV-style VideoCapture (MJPEG/GIF/Y4M/image-sequence/HTTP-MJPEG). Public modules live in the img_ namespace; internal codec modules live in _img_o6769_ to keep the global module list clean.
